Ernst Roell
HomeResearchAidos Lab

Welcome to my website. This is where I will write about my research and possibly other hobbies. I am a doctoral researcher at the AIDOS Lab under the supervision of dr. Bastian Rieck and a PhD candidate the Technical University of Munchen.

In my free time you will find me doing various activities, such as surfing, riding my motorcycle, diving or making homemade bonbons.

Ernst Roell
